subcodes.first_line: O mysteries of that noble Master of the righteous! If the descendants be imbued with the essence of their fathers' soul and heart, this verily is goodly character [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای اسرار آن سید ابرار ابناء اگر از عنصر جان و دل آباء باشند یعنی حسن اخلاق
subcodes.subjects: @consolation and comfort, @Noah, @characteristics and conduct of true believers
